meme.title: Does anyone else feels the same?

headlines.h: Opinion: Two types of people: nope and nope 💀 (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Come play with us...
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Me after doing the bare minimum: 😵‍💫
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Markets React To: Is your cat a 5th dimensional elder god?? 😨😭
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
